statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow slice: Quick Sheet source confidence.

Changed:
- Added `quick-sheet.html#source-confidence` with truck-label priority, Honda/source links, and clear confidence notes.
- Marked battery size/CCA as common replacement references, not primary Honda specs.
- Marked bolt pattern/center bore as fitment-reference values.
- Added search entry for `quick sheet sources`.
- Extended browser smoke assertions for the new source section and external source link attributes.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v259`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge smoke still hit the known empty/main-landmark render failure.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for desktop, iPhone-width, search, print-media visibility, no horizontal overflow, and external source-link attributes.
- Screenshots saved under `debug-screenshots/audit-v259-*source-confidence*.png`.

Sources used:
- Honda towing reference: https://www.hondainfocenter.com/2019/Ridgeline/Feature-Guide/Engine-Chassis-Features/Towing-Capacity/
- Honda specifications: https://www.hondainfocenter.com/2019/Ridgeline/Feature-Guide/Specifications/
- Honda 2019 Ridgeline owner manual PDF: https://techinfo.honda.com/rjanisis/pubs/OM/AH/ATHR1919OM/enu/ATHR1919OM.PDF
- Honda accessory wheel instructions: https://www.bernardiparts.com/Images/Install/2018_Ridgeline_18inchAluminumWheelTG7_AII06945-38.pdf

Next safe slice: mobile/print density pass on the quick sheet after real-device review, or continue deeper fuse source validation against owner-manual/cover-label references.
